scripts.start: npm run build -w @argent/registry && npm run dev -w @argent/tool-server
scripts.start:tool-server: npm run build -w @argent/registry && npm run dev -w @argent/tool-server
scripts.pack: npm run download:simulator-server && npm run download:native-binaries && npm run build && npm run build -w @swmansion/argent && npm pack -w @swmansion/argent --pack-destination .
